author: aqeja
description: Works with the ClipperMaster Chrome extension to clip structured content from the web and save it to your vault as Markdown files.

manifest.author: ClipperMaster Team
manifest.description: Works with the ClipperMaster Chrome extension to clip structured content from the web and save it to your vault as Markdown files.
manifest.name: ClipperMaster

name: ClipperMaster

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
通过[ClipperMaste](https://clippermaster.com/) 提取的网页里的结构化内容现在可以同步到Obsidian了。

Structured content extracted from web pages via [ClipperMaste](https://clippermaster.com/) can now be synchronized with Obsidian
